name: agent-relay-mcp
description: Public Codex MCP client for AgentRelay.

scripts.test: npm run test:syntax && npm run test:examples && node scripts/mcp_smoke_test.mjs
scripts.test:syntax: node --check mcp/server.mjs && node --check scripts/doctor.mjs && node --check scripts/install-codex-mcp.mjs && node --check scripts/install-codex-app-inbox-example.mjs && node --check scripts/install-listener-service.mjs && node --check scripts/listener.mjs && node --check scripts/mcp_smoke_test.mjs && node --check examples/codex-app-inbox/scripts/agentrelay-thread-adapter.mjs && node --check examples/codex-app-inbox/scripts/agentrelay-thread-daemon.mjs && node --check examples/codex-app-inbox/scripts/install-thread-daemon-service.mjs && node --check examples/codex-app-inbox/scripts/smoke-codex-app-inbox.mjs
